research_question: After freezing v18 as the working reference, which additional atomic price-volume signals deserve entry into the next family-construction pool under the v18 operational contract, and which should be rejected before any new mixed family is built?

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

signal_pool.interpretation: a lower long-horizon volatility level may be cleaner than the rejected 20-day low-volatility signal because the slower horizon should be less noisy

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This isolates whether the rejected low-volatility mechanism improves materially when smoothed onto a longer horizon.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as an explicit slower-horizon variant of the same volatility-level mechanism.

signal_pool.interpretation: a higher structural 60-day liquidity level may behave differently from the rejected 20-day liquidity level and is worth testing before we rule out liquidity-level effects entirely

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests whether the failed liquidity-level mechanism was only too short-horizon rather than structurally wrong.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a slower-horizon variant before fully retiring liquidity-level effects.

signal_pool.interpretation: the earlier contrarian reversal hypothesis was clearly negative, so this is a preregistered directional inversion test of whether short-horizon continuation rather than reversal carries the edge

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This keeps the same raw mechanism but explicitly tests whether the sign of the short-horizon effect was mis-specified.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a preregistered inverse-direction test after the contrarian direction failed.

signal_pool.interpretation: the calmer-volatility-regime hypothesis was negative, so this is a preregistered directional inversion test of whether expansionary short-vs-medium volatility regimes carry the edge instead

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests whether the volatility-regime mechanism works in the opposite state direction rather than in the originally assumed calm regime.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a preregistered inverse-direction test after the calm-regime hypothesis failed.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later family-construction round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative full-sample IC, inverted decile ordering, or clearly worse head labels than tail labels should be rejected rather than rescued by later extraction or refresh tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, or stability-cap changes inside this round.
Do not sweep multiple alternative directions for the same signal beyond the four preregistered hypotheses in this batch.
Do not introduce PIT quality, value, or investment fields into this round.
notes: This round starts only after freezing v18 as the current working reference and explicitly pausing further micro-tuning of the v19/v20 portfolio-layer line.

The first discovery round already established momentum_60_5_raw and liquidity_trend_20_60_raw as retained atomic signals; this second batch focuses on either smoother horizon variants or preregistered directional inversion tests with clear motivation.
Candidates should be registered and run one by one under this frozen round contract rather than opened in parallel without review.
